findings.finding: Task 7 install.sh hardcodes v0.1.0 with no fallback or sentinel; curl|sh failures during merge-but-pre-tag window are silent.
findings.evidence_quote: Hardcode `v0.1.0` for the initial implementation; a follow-up can wire `gh release view` once tag discipline is established.

findings.finding: Task 6 advisory cortex upgrade message points users at https://github.com/.../releases for current tags during the bootstrap window when no release exists.
findings.evidence_quote: Or run `uv tool install --reinstall git+https://github.com/charleshall888/cortex-command.git@<tag>` for the bare-shell path; see https://github.com/charleshall888/cortex-command/releases for current tags.

findings.finding: Task 10 tests cannot detect dangling-tag hazard because subprocess.run is mocked and test_target_state builds wheel from working tree, not git+...@v0.1.0.
findings.evidence_quote: Use unittest.mock.patch("subprocess.run", ...) to capture invocations without running the real uv tool install.

findings.finding: Task 14 verification (grep -E 'uv build|softprops/action-gh-release|gh release create' .github/workflows/release.yml | wc -l >= 2) does not validate YAML syntax, permissions, or runner availability; partial failures pass verification.
findings.evidence_quote: Wait for .github/workflows/release.yml to complete (workflow created in Task 13). Verify via gh run list --workflow=release.yml --limit 5 and gh release list --limit 5.

findings.finding: orchestrator.py:189 references outcome_router._PROJECT_ROOT inside a try/except Exception: pass block; Task 5 deletes _PROJECT_ROOT but the exception-swallowing erodes diagnostics silently.
findings.reviewer_angle: Call-time path resolution and worker isolation
findings.evidence_quote: Caller enumeration: grep -rn _LIFECYCLE_ROOT cortex_command/overnight/ to confirm internal-only — these are module-private constants prefixed with underscore, no external callers.

findings.finding: _PROJECT_ROOT/'backlog' and _resolve_user_project_root()/'backlog' have different anchor semantics (module-file vs CWD/env-var); plan elides the semantic shift.
findings.evidence_quote: Replace _PROJECT_ROOT / "backlog" references on lines 360 and 417 with _resolve_user_project_root() / "backlog" evaluated in-function

findings.finding: Task 5 specifies updating outcome_router.py:312 comment but verification only asserts grep -c '_PROJECT_ROOT' = 0; comment update is unverified.
findings.evidence_quote: overnight/outcome_router.py:312 — comment block referencing _PROJECT_ROOT becomes stale; update to reference _resolve_user_project_root().

findings.finding: MCP-side _orchestrate_upgrade and _orchestrate_schema_floor_upgrade build flock paths and run git -C $cortex_root commands against the package install path under Task 6; orchestrator dies silently or writes into venv.
findings.evidence_quote: Caller enumeration for _resolve_cortex_root: grep -rn _resolve_cortex_root cortex_command/ returns cli.py:222 (Task 6 reworks), cli.py:260 (Task 6 deletes — line is inside _dispatch_upgrade's removed body).

findings.finding: tests/test_cli_print_root.py asserts len(head_sha)==40 and len(remote_url)>0; Task 6 breaks this. Task 15's fallback framing under-specifies the rewrite.
findings.evidence_quote: Also tests/test_cli_print_root.py and tests/test_cli_upgrade.py may reference it via patching — search grep -rn _resolve_cortex_root|CORTEX_COMMAND_ROOT tests/ and update test fixtures to inject CORTEX_REPO_ROOT instead.

findings.finding: _resolve_user_project_root() resolves to CWD/CORTEX_REPO_ROOT (user project), while _dispatch_print_root resolves root to Path(cortex_command.__file__).parent (package install). Two distinct answers to 'where am I?' for the same user; MCP must reconcile.
findings.evidence_quote: Rework _dispatch_print_root to derive root from Path(cortex_command.__file__).parent (with optional CORTEX_REPO_ROOT override) and emit empty strings for remote_url / head_sha when no git clone exists.
